# HPD.ML.Transforms.ValueToKeyTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Maps string/value columns to integer keys. The inverse of KeyToValueTransform.
